cases.input: design review auf den neuen settings-screen branch - ist alles konform zu DESIGN.md?
cases.expected_output: Reads SKILL.md, checks diff against DESIGN.md rules, verifies shared-ui usage, reports DESIGN violations

cases.input: UI conformance check bitte, ich habe eigene Buttons gebaut und bin mir unsicher ob das ok ist
cases.expected_output: Reads SKILL.md, flags custom Button vs shared-ui/Button, lists DESIGN.md token/component violations

cases.input: check this PR for DESIGN violations before merge, new onboarding flow has lots of custom spacing
cases.expected_output: Reads SKILL.md, audits spacing/tokens against DESIGN.md, flags non-shared-ui layouts

cases.input: nutzt der branch shared-ui komponenten oder hat der dev wieder was eigenes gebaut?
cases.expected_output: Reads SKILL.md, greps for shared-ui imports vs local component defs, reports coverage

cases.input: /design-review bitte, wichtig für den release heute
cases.expected_output: Reads SKILL.md, runs full DESIGN.md conformance + shared-ui audit on current branch

cases.input: review PR #301 bitte, SOLID feedback für den neuen service layer
der branch ist pure backend (neuer cron + db migration) - kannst du reviewen?
cases.expected_output: Uses code-review-expert skill, not design-review (no UI surface)

cases.input: die CI failed auf visual-regression snapshot, kannst du helfen?
cases.expected_output: Uses debugging or CI tools directly, not design-review
